name: CSV to Chart
description: Generate a chart image from CSV data. Supports line, bar, scatter, and histogram chart types with automatic axis labeling and optional title.

xColumn.description: Column name for the X axis

yColumn.description: Column name for the Y axis

chartPath.description: Path to the generated chart image (PNG)

assumptions: CSV file exists and contains the specified columns
Column data is numeric or convertible to numeric for plotting

implementation.code:
import sys
import os
import json
import csv
import tempfile

def main():
    inputs = json.loads(os.environ.get('SKILL_INPUTS', '{}'))
    csv_path = inputs.get('csvPath', '')
    chart_type = inputs.get('chartType', 'line')
    x_col = inputs.get('xColumn', '')
    y_col = inputs.get('yColumn', '')
    title = inputs.get('title', '')

    if not csv_path or not os.path.exists(csv_path):
        print(json.dumps({'chartPath': '', 'error': f'File not found: {csv_path}'}))
        return

    try:
        import matplotlib
        matplotlib.use('Agg')
        import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
        import matplotlib.dates as mdates
    except ImportError:
        print(json.dumps({'chartPath': '', 'error': 'matplotlib is not installed'}))
        return

    # Read CSV
    rows = []
    with open(csv_path, 'r', newline='', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        reader = csv.DictReader(f)
        if not reader.fieldnames:
            print(json.dumps({'chartPath': '', 'error': 'CSV has no headers'}))
            return
        for row in reader:
            rows.append(row)

    if not rows:
        print(json.dumps({'chartPath': '', 'error': 'CSV is empty'}))
        return

    if x_col not in rows[0]:
        print(json.dumps({'chartPath': '', 'error': f'Column "{x_col}" not found. Available: {list(rows[0].keys())}'}))
        return
    if y_col not in rows[0]:
        print(json.dumps({'chartPath': '', 'error': f'Column "{y_col}" not found. Available: {list(rows[0].keys())}'}))
        return

    # Extract and convert data
    def to_numeric(val):
        try:
            return float(val)
        except (ValueError, TypeError):
            return None

    x_raw = [row.get(x_col, '') for row in rows]
    y_raw = [row.get(y_col, '') for row in rows]

    # Try numeric conversion for y
    y_vals = [to_numeric(v) for v in y_raw]
    y_numeric = [v for v in y_vals if v is not None]

    # Try numeric conversion for x
    x_vals = [to_numeric(v) for v in x_raw]
    x_is_numeric = sum(1 for v in x_vals if v is not None) > len(x_vals) * 0.5

    if not y_numeric:
        print(json.dumps({'chartPath': '', 'error': f'Column "{y_col}" has no numeric values'}))
        return

    # Filter to rows where both x and y are valid
    if x_is_numeric:
        pairs = [(xv, yv) for xv, yv in zip(x_vals, y_vals) if xv is not None and yv is not None]
        x_plot = [p[0] for p in pairs]
        y_plot = [p[1] for p in pairs]
    else:
        pairs = [(xr, yv) for xr, yv in zip(x_raw, y_vals) if yv is not None]
        x_plot = [p[0] for p in pairs]
        y_plot = [p[1] for p in pairs]

    if not x_plot:
        print(json.dumps({'chartPath': '', 'error': 'No valid data points after filtering'}))
        return

    # Create chart
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 7))

    if chart_type == 'line':
        ax.plot(x_plot, y_plot, marker='o', markersize=3, linewidth=1.5)
    elif chart_type == 'bar':
        if len(x_plot) > 50:
            # Too many bars - show first 50
            x_plot = x_plot[:50]
            y_plot = y_plot[:50]
        ax.bar(range(len(x_plot)), y_plot, tick_label=[str(x)[:15] for x in x_plot])
        plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
    elif chart_type == 'scatter':
        ax.scatter(x_plot, y_plot, alpha=0.6, s=20)
    elif chart_type == 'histogram':
        bins = min(50, max(10, len(y_plot) // 5))
        ax.hist(y_plot, bins=bins, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.7)
        ax.set_xlabel(y_col)
        ax.set_ylabel('Frequency')
    else:
        print(json.dumps({'chartPath': '', 'error': f'Unknown chart type: {chart_type}'}))
        return

    if chart_type != 'histogram':
        ax.set_xlabel(x_col)
        ax.set_ylabel(y_col)

    if title:
        ax.set_title(title)
    else:
        ax.set_title(f'{chart_type.capitalize()}: {y_col} vs {x_col}')

    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    plt.tight_layout()

    # Save
    out_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix='cosmo_chart_')
    chart_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f'{chart_type}_chart.png')
    fig.savefig(chart_path, dpi=150)
    plt.close(fig)

    print(json.dumps({'chartPath': chart_path}))

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
